## 1. FalkorDB connections — created per-call (confirmed issue)

**`congress_act.py`, line 82–89** and **`word_activity.py`, line 62–67**: Both create a brand-new `FalkorDB(...)` TCP connection every time the helper function is called. There is no module-level singleton, no connection pool, no reuse.
